title: Composite unique index on two columns
prompt: Write a migration that creates a unique_index on the `posts` table covering both `(user_id, slug)`. Name the index explicitly as `:posts_user_id_slug_index`. Write to priv/repo/migrations/20260411500000_composite_unique_index.exs.
tier_rationale: Single migration statement. Easy but discriminates against plain `index` (non-unique).
